# Harsha Packers and Movers Bangalore

> Government-registered packers and movers in Bangalore since 2005. Rated 4.8 stars by 122+ customers on Google. We provide safe, affordable home shifting, office relocation, bike and car transport, storage and warehousing, and intercity moving from Bangalore to all over India.

## Contact
- Phone / WhatsApp: +91 90352 91929
- Email: harshapackersmovers@gmail.com
- Address: No 61, Ground Floor, 1st Cross, BGS Layout, Jambusavari Dinne Main Road, Near BWSSB Water Tank, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560076, India
- Hours: Open 24 hours, all 7 days
- Website: https://harshapackersandmoversbangalore.com

## Services
- [Local Home Shifting](https://harshapackersandmoversbangalore.com/local-shifting-in-bangalore/): Affordable local shifting in Bangalore by Harsha Packers and Movers. Safe packing, careful loading and same-day home shifting within Bangalore. Get a free quote.
- [Household Shifting](https://harshapackersandmoversbangalore.com/household-shifting-in-bangalore/): Trusted household shifting in Bangalore. Harsha Packers and Movers offers full-service home packing, moving and unpacking with care and insurance options. Free quote.
- [Office Relocation](https://harshapackersandmoversbangalore.com/office-shifting-in-bangalore/): Office shifting in Bangalore with minimal downtime. Harsha Packers and Movers relocates offices, IT equipment and files safely after hours. Get a free quote today.
- [Bike Transport](https://harshapackersandmoversbangalore.com/bike-transport-in-bangalore/): Safe bike transport in Bangalore and across India. Harsha Packers and Movers offers insured two-wheeler shifting with proper crating and doorstep delivery.
- [Car Transport](https://harshapackersandmoversbangalore.com/car-transport-in-bangalore/): Reliable car transport in Bangalore using enclosed car carriers. Harsha Packers and Movers offers insured, door-to-door car shifting across India. Free quote.
- [Storage & Warehousing](https://harshapackersandmoversbangalore.com/storage-warehousing-in-bangalore/): Clean, secure storage and warehousing in Bangalore. Harsha Packers and Movers offers short and long-term storage with CCTV, racking and inventory management.
- [Goods Transport](https://harshapackersandmoversbangalore.com/goods-transport-services-in-bangalore/): Goods transport services in Bangalore for households and businesses. Harsha Packers and Movers offers tempo, truck and full-load transport across India.
- [Logistics Services](https://harshapackersandmoversbangalore.com/logistic-services-in-bangalore/): Complete logistics services in Bangalore. Harsha Packers and Movers offers freight, distribution and supply-chain support for businesses across India.
- [Domestic Shifting](https://harshapackersandmoversbangalore.com/domestic-shifting/): Domestic shifting from Bangalore to any city in India. Harsha Packers and Movers offers safe, insured intercity home and office relocation. Get a free quote.
- [Pre-Move Survey](https://harshapackersandmoversbangalore.com/pre-move-survey-in-bangalore/): Get a free pre-move survey in Bangalore from Harsha Packers and Movers. Accurate, transparent moving quotes with no hidden charges. Book your survey today.

- 20+ years of experience (since 2005)
- Government of India registered (Udyam Reg. No. UDYAM-KR-03-0196744)
- Transparent, fixed pricing with no hidden charges
- Trained in-house packing crew and own fleet

- Rated 4.8/5 by 122+ customers on Google

## Typical Pricing in Bangalore (indicative)
- 1 BHK local shifting: Rs 3,000-8,000
- 2-3 BHK local shifting: Rs 6,000-15,000
- Intercity moves from Bangalore: from Rs 15,000-40,000 depending on distance and volume
- Bike transport: from Rs 3,000-6,000; Car transport: from Rs 8,000-18,000
- Final price is fixed after a free pre-move survey, with no hidden charges.

## Frequently Asked Questions
### How much do packers and movers charge in Bangalore?
Local shifting within Bangalore typically starts from around ₹3,000–₹8,000 for a 1 BHK and ₹6,000–₹15,000 for a 2–3 BHK, depending on the volume of goods, floor level, distance and packing required. For an exact, no-obligation price, request a free pre-move survey and we will give you a fixed, transparent quote.

### Do you provide packing materials and labour?
Yes. Our charges include professional packing materials such as bubble wrap, corrugated sheets, cartons and stretch film, along with a trained in-house crew for packing, loading, unloading and basic furniture assembly.

### Is my shipment insured during the move?
We offer optional transit insurance for both local and intercity moves. We strongly recommend it for high-value households and long-distance relocations. Our team will explain the coverage and help you arrange it.

### Do you offer same-day shifting in Bangalore?
Yes, for most local moves within Bangalore we can arrange same-day or next-day shifting subject to crew and vehicle availability. Call us on +91 90352 91929 to check the earliest available slot.

### Which areas of Bangalore do you cover?
We cover all of Bangalore including Whitefield, Marathahalli, HSR Layout, Koramangala, Electronic City, Indiranagar, JP Nagar, Jayanagar, Hebbal, Yelahanka and every other locality, plus intercity moves from Bangalore to anywhere in India.

### How do I get a quote from Harsha Packers and Movers?
You can call or WhatsApp us on +91 90352 91929, or fill in the quote form on this page. We will arrange a free survey and share a fixed, itemised quotation with no hidden charges.

### Which is the best packers and movers in Bangalore?
Harsha Packers and Movers is among the most trusted packers and movers in Bangalore — government-registered (Udyam) and serving the city since 2005, with a 4.8-star rating from 122+ Google reviews. We are known for safe packing, on-time delivery, transparent fixed pricing and trained in-house crews for home, office and vehicle shifting.

### Are Harsha Packers and Movers genuine and reliable?
Yes. Harsha Packers and Movers is a Government of India registered company (Udyam Reg. No. UDYAM-KR-03-0196744) operating in Bangalore since 2005, with a 4.8-star rating from 122+ verified Google reviews. We provide written quotations, proper bills and optional transit insurance, so every move is safe and transparent.

### How far in advance should I book packers and movers in Bangalore?
We recommend booking 3–5 days ahead for local shifting within Bangalore and 5–7 days for intercity moves, especially on weekends and month-ends when demand is high. For urgent moves we also arrange same-day or next-day shifting subject to availability — call +91 90352 91929 to check.

### Do you provide a GST bill or invoice?
Yes. We provide a proper bill for every move and can issue a GST invoice on request, which is helpful for company-paid relocations and reimbursement claims. Please mention this to our team at the time of booking.

### Do you handle office and commercial relocation in Bangalore?
Yes, we handle office and commercial relocation across Bangalore — including IT setups, workstations, servers, files and furniture — with careful packing, labelling and minimal downtime. Office moves can be scheduled over weekends or after working hours to avoid disruption.

### What is the cheapest way to shift a house in Bangalore?
The most affordable way to shift in Bangalore is to choose a shared or part-load move, declutter before packing, stay flexible on dates (avoid weekends and month-ends) and book a few days in advance. After a free survey we suggest the most cost-effective option for your home size and budget.
